name: NUnit
description: Unit-testing framework for .NET languages originally ported from JUnit, supporting parameterized tests, categories and parallel execution.

seo.title: NUnit — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: NUnit: Unit-testing framework for .NET languages originally ported from JUnit, supporting parameterized tests, categories and parallel execution.

when_to_use: Data-driven parameterized tests with TestCase attributes
Parallel test execution with ParallelScope configuration
Category filters to run only smoke or regression tests
Setup/TearDown lifecycle management for .NET test suites

pros: Rich parameterized test support via TestCase
Parallel execution at fixture and test level
cons: xUnit.net is now Microsoft's default choice
review.verdict: Battle-tested .NET framework that still works well, though new projects usually pick xUnit.net instead.
review.best_for: Existing .NET codebases with NUnit investment or teams preferring its assertion model
review.not_for: Greenfield .NET projects where xUnit matches dotnet CLI defaults
